full_text:
Niu Jin 牛金
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Niu Jin (牛金). Subordinate of Cao Ren. Attacked Zhou Yu’s camp at Nanjun, but was defeated and rescued by Cao Ren. Niu Jin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
